# Version 3.119.4
> **Platform refresh and stability** · Released May 22, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.4) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.4)

> **Supersedes [3.119.3](3.119.3.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.4/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.1.5/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.4 stabilises Tizen, tvOS and GTK4, refreshes native dependencies, and lands the redesigned Gallery. This servicing release adds Linux Bionic and Tizen x64/arm64 native assets, fixes long-standing tvOS and GTK4 crashes, hardens AoT and stream handling, and refreshes libpng, libwebp, brotli and libexpat. The developer sample suite is rebuilt end-to-end and the docs move to an interactive Blazor Gallery.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## API Surface

- **New GTK4 view** — Adds SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 built on GirCore.Gtk-4.0 so GTK4 apps get a first-class SkiaSharp surface. ([#3527](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3527))
- **SKManagedStream reworked around SKData** — SKManagedStream now snapshots into SKData instead of maintaining a parent/child chain, removing a class of ownership crashes when streams outlive their owner. ([#3589](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3589))

## Bug Fixes

- **AoT crash fixed** — SkiaSharp no longer crashes at startup when the app is published with IlcDisableReflection=true. ([#3485](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3485))
- **GTK4 drawing crash fixed** — SKDrawingArea no longer hits a Cairo assertion when the widget is realised. ([#3562](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3562))
- **tvOS builds stop mixing simulator and device frameworks** — The tvOS NativeReference targets now split device and simulator frameworks the same way iOS does, so builds pick the right binary. ([#3561](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3561), [#3563](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3563))
- **Android MAUI tab rendering** — SKGLView now redraws after switching tabs in a MAUI TabBar on Android. — ❤️ [@SimonvBez](https://github.com/SimonvBez) ([#3076](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3076))
- **WindowsForms design-time** — The WindowsForms controls read DesignMode directly instead of walking the component tree, which fixes designer-only misbehaviour. ([#3614](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3614))
- **D3D12 delay-loaded** — D3D12 DLLs are now delay-loaded so Windows machines without DirectX 12 no longer crash on startup. ([#3633](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3633))

## Platform

- **Linux Bionic natives** — Adds a Linux Bionic (Android libc) native asset alongside the existing glibc build. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3217](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3217))
- **Tizen x64 and arm64** — Adds Tizen x64 and arm64 native builds and moves Tizen to Studio 6.1 with corrected TFMs. ([#3620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3620), [#3619](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3619))
- **.NET 10 SDK** — Moves the build to the .NET 10 SDK with workload-set pinning, and adds a net48 target used for Windows validation. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3514](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3514), [#3631](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3631))
- **Linker hardening** — Linux and Android native builds now enforce -Wl,--no-undefined so missing symbols fail the build instead of the runtime. ([#3629](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3629))

## Security

- **Bundled native dependencies refreshed** — libpng, libwebp, brotli and libexpat are all updated in the bundled Skia to pick up the current upstream fixes. ([#3723](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3723), [#3478](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3478), [#3469](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3469), [#3452](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3452), [#3463](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3463))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.5

Picks up the tvOS device/simulator split, the Tizen native additions and the .NET 10 SDK move that also apply to the HarfBuzzSharp binding. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3217](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3217), [#3620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3620), [#3619](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3619), [#3563](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3563), [#3561](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3561), [#3514](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3514))
